sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">GGM</title_> ii p. 494. <title_ TEIform="title">in Cat. = Anonymi in Aristotelis Categorias paraphrasis,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xxiii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1883. <title_ TEIform="title">in EN = Anonymi in Ethica Nicomachea commentaria,</title_> ed. G. Heylbut (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xx), Berlin 1892. <title_ TEIform="title">in Prm. = Anonymi Commentarius in Platonis Parmenidem,</title_> ed. W. Kroll in <title_ TEIform="title">Rh. Mus.</title_> xlvii (1892) 599. <title_ TEIform="title">in Rh. = Anonymi in Artem Rhetoricam commentaria,</title_> ed. H. Rabe (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xxi <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1896. <title_ TEIform="title">in SE = in Sophisticos Elenchos paraphrasis,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xxiii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iv), Berlin 1884. <title_ TEIform="title">in Tht. = Anonymi Commentarius in Platonis Theaetetum,</title_> ed. H. Diels & W. Schubart, <title_ TEIform="title">BKT</title_> ii, Berlin 1905. <title_ TEIform="title">Incred.</title_> = Anonymus, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ ἀπίστων,</foreign> ed. N. Festa (post Palaephatum (q. v.), p. 88), Leipzig (T.) 1902. <title_ TEIform="title">Trop.</title_> = Anonymi, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τρόπων,</foreign> ed. L. Spengel, <title_ TEIform="title">Rhet.</title_> iii pp. 207, 227.</item>
